article_title: State Highway Work Zone Speed Safety Program
text: This article shall remain in effect only until January 1, 2032, and as of that date is repealed.
markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 11. RULES OF THE ROAD [21000 - 23336]
### Chapter 7. Speed Laws [22348 - 22445.6]
#### Article 5. State Highway Work Zone Speed Safety Program [22445 - 22445.6]
##### § 22445.6

This article shall remain in effect only until January 1, 2032, and as of that date is repealed.

*(Added by Stats. 2025, Ch. 684, Sec. 3. (AB 289) Effective January 1, 2026. Repealed as of January 1, 2032, by its own provisions. Note: Repeal affects Article 5, commencing with Section 22445.)*

subsections.text: This article shall remain in effect only until January 1, 2032, and as of that date is repealed.
